source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/02_ADD (HAD1417MCW)/▶ 국내 제조인증/1.차 KGMP 등록 문서/console sw validation/13. Software Validation Report_KOR_2.1.255.40_201016_완료.pdf

document.title: Software Validation Console Report for ADD Abyz Digital Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: Software validation report for feel-DRCS console software version 2.1.255.40 used with the HAD1417MCW detector.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory/quality documentation for software lifecycle validation, risk management, cybersecurity, traceability, testing, and release of a digital X-ray console software.
keyPoints: The software name is feel-DRCS and version is 2.1.255.40.
The connected hardware is the HAD1417MCW detector.
Applicable standards listed include ISO 62304:2006+AMD1:2015 and ISO 14971:2007.
The software safety classification is Class B.
Unit, integration, system, regression, and security test appendices show Pass results.
The release section states that software function verification, regression testing, and risk management review were completed before release.

entities.name: ADD Abyz Digital Detector
entities.evidence: Software Validaton Console Report for ADD Abyz Digital Detector

entities.name: PACS
entities.evidence: PACS – Picture Archiving and Communication System.

entities.name: DICOM
entities.evidence: DICOM – Digital Imaging and Communications in Medicine (DICOM)은 의료영상정보를 관리 및 저장, 인쇄 및 젂송하기 위한 표준.

concepts.name: Software validation report
concepts.evidence: 13. Software Validation Report Rev. Date SEP/24/2020

concepts.name: Risk management
concepts.evidence: 본 소프트웨어 개발생명주기 젂반에 걸쳐서 ISO 14971:2007을 적용한다.

concepts.name: Quality management system
concepts.evidence: 당사의 품질 경영 시스템인 EN ISO 13485:2016 에 의하여 소프트웨어 개발 및 관리를 실시한다.

concepts.name: PEMS
concepts.evidence: PEMS의 범위 - X선 검출기의 연결 및 병원정보망과 통싞하는 DICOM Network 관렦된 기능들에 대하여 PEMS 로 정의한다.

evidence.claim: The report file number is A-TCF-5-072 with revision 0.
The report date is SEP/24/2020.
The report is for ADD Abyz Digital Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Software Validaton Console Report for ADD Abyz Digital Detector

evidence.claim: The software is feel-DRCS version 2.1.255.40.
The connected hardware is the HAD1417MCW detector.
The software supports DICOM 3.0 and transfers images to PACS or film printers.
evidence.evidenceText: 의료영상의 국제표준인 DICOM 3.0을 지원하며... PACS 서버로 영상을 젂송하거나, 의료용 필름 프릮터장치로 필름을 출력하는 소프트웨어이다.

evidence.claim: Applicable standards include ISO 62304:2006+AMD1:2015 and ISO 14971:2007.
Software development and management are performed under EN ISO 13485:2016.
evidence.evidenceText: 당사의 품질 경영 시스템인 EN ISO 13485:2016 에 의하여 소프트웨어 개발 및 관리를 실시한다.

evidence.claim: The software safety classification is Class B.
Legacy software is not applicable.
The development type is a change/update.
The development method is waterfall.
The PEMS scope includes X-ray detector connection and DICOM Network functions communicating with hospital information networks.
evidence.evidenceText: X선 검출기의 연결 및 병원정보망과 통싞하는 DICOM Network 관렦된 기능들에 대하여 PEMS 로 정의한다.

evidence.claim: Unit test results passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Appendix 2. Status :  Unit Test... Acceptance: Pass

evidence.claim: Integration test results passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Appendix 3. Status : Unit Test /  Integration Test... Acceptance: Pass

evidence.claim: System test results passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Appendix 4. Status : Unit Test /  Integration Test /  System Test... Acceptance: Pass

evidence.claim: Security test results passed.
evidence.evidenceText: Appendix 5. Status :...  Security Test... Acceptance: Pass

evidence.claim: The cybersecurity safety grade is medium.
The communication technology used is wired LAN.
The version history for 2.1.255.40 adds the H&abyz HAD1417MCW detector.
evidence.evidenceText: 2.1.255.40 Add Function  Add H&abyz HAD1417MCW detector

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is only provided by metadata authoritySignal as MFDS/domestic; the report text itself does not explicitly name MFDS.
OCR quality is imperfect, with repeated Korean character recognition artifacts such as 젂, 버젂, 안젂성, and 통싞.
Page numbering is inconsistent: early pages show Page 1 / 83, while later Technical File pages show Page 72 / 117 through Page 117 / 117.
